implementation_instructions.production: Evaluate phases in order. Within each phase, evaluate rules top to bottom, executing the first matching rule. Re-evaluate every time a city finishes producing a unit.
implementation_instructions.shared_functions: Use existing shared functions where applicable

phases.Explore: Fully explore starting island and take all cities on it
phases.Expand: Home island secure — build transports, push armies to other islands
phases.Combat: First enemy contact made — full warfare production

Expand.note: 1 transport per 3 army-producing cities on this island

conditions: Enemy city is reachable by land from this city
City has no access to water
Combat.note: Pick whichever of Fighter/Bomber we have fewer of (alive + in production). Random tiebreak.

Combat.produce: lowest_score(Transport, Battleship, Submarine, Destroyer, Fighter, Bomber)

shared_functions.active_transports: Count of Transport units currently alive
shared_functions.army_producing_cities_on_this_island: Count of our cities on the same island currently producing Army (excluding this city)
shared_functions.enemy_reachable_by_land: BFS over land tiles only — true if any visible enemy-owned city is connected to this city without crossing ocean
shared_functions.has_water_access: True if any of the 8 tiles adjacent to the city is ocean
shared_functions.balance(a, b): Return whichever unit type has fewer (alive + in_production). Random if equal.
shared_functions.lowest_score(...): For each listed unit type, compute (alive + in_production) * buildTime / scalingFactor. Return the type with the lowest score.
